title: Morning Assembly Theme
content: This week focuses on discipline and teamwork. Students should prepare short reflections.

title: Holiday Announcement
content: School will remain closed on 2026-03-25 for regional festivities.

title: Important: ID Card Reissue Deadline
content: All students must submit ID card reissue forms by 2026-03-28. Late applications incur a fee.

title: Daily Update: House Practice
content: Inter-house drill practice for classes 6-10 will be held from 1:30 PM in the main ground.

title: Daily Update: Uniform Check
content: Students are requested to wear complete summer uniform from Monday, 2026-03-30.

title: Holiday: Ram Navami
content: School will remain closed on 2026-04-05 on account of Ram Navami.

title: Holiday: Good Friday
content: School will remain closed on 2026-04-03. Regular classes resume on 2026-04-04.
